---
title: "John Keble’s Parishes: A History of Hursley and Otterbourne. By Charlotte M. Yonge, An Old Inhabitant."
---

## John Keble’s Parishes: A History of Hursley and Otterbourne. By Charlotte M. Yonge, An Old Inhabitant.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1898
**Genre:** Non-fiction: history, topography
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** London and New York: Macmillan and Co.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
